series_metadata.series_description: Includes all documentation relating to appeals of Director's orders, eligibility determinations, claim settlements, denials or revocations or certificate of coverage, and financial and technical audits.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Five years from the date the latest may have been sought. For claims, five years from the later of the following two events: The date the claim is closed or the last claim is settled, or the date the latest appeal may have been sought, Paper: Wastepaper
